title: cyperus koyaliensis
intro: Cyperus koyaliensis, also known as Koyali grass or Gajari, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-diabetic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus koyaliensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
